top_signals.title: ASML rises 3% after hiking sales forecast for second time this year on strong AI chip demand
top_signals.summary: ASML on Wednesday raised its guidance for a second time this year as its customers continue to ramp up their production capacity of AI chips.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
